appraisal_events.evidence: « le suprême bonheur eût été de rencontrer Legrandin avec lequel je venais de causer en rêve »; puis il pose « mille questions sur la famille Legrandin ».
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator shows a pointed desire to see Legrandin and to inquire about him, which elevates him locally. But this valorization is framed as arising from a dream and a physiological state, which ironizes it and limits its stability.

status_effects.explanation: Legrandin locally gains in esteem as the object of the « suprême bonheur » and of the narrator’s curiosity.
